body_txt: Hats, caps, hoods, crowns, tiaras, headbands, helmets, and all the other things that cover at least part of your head. See also Meaningful Appearance , the umbrella trope for when the character's looks say something about the character. Contrast These Tropes Are Made for Walking (if you count feet as opposite of the head). Not to be confused with the Planet of Hats trope and its children, which is about speculative fiction cultures each having one major thing ("hat") they're known for.
